news.t: Water Investing: 5 Funds You Should Tap

holdings.infoBox: CGW is an equity ETF with a total of 82 individual holdings. The top holdings are American Water Works Company stock at 7.82%, Xylem at 7.26%, Companhia de Saneamento Básico do Estado de São Paulo - SABESP at 7.17%, Essential Utilities at 5.85%, and Veralto at 5.13%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P Global Water Index ETF (CGW) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Global Water index, a market-cap-weighted index of global water utilities, infrastructure and water equipment & materials companies. CGW was launched on May 14, 2007 and is issued by Invesco.
